hero.tagline: Full-stack engineer. I build production SaaS from Figma to Kubernetes. Based in Yaoundé, shipping globally.

about.label: ABOUT
about.headline: Building products that ship end-to-end.
about.p1: Full-stack engineer with a {holistic view} of the lifecycle : from {pixel-perfect UI} in Figma to {production APIs}, from {shipping features} to managing the {infrastructure} they run on.
about.p2: I work across the {full stack} without switching context. Design decisions inform {backend architecture}. DevOps constraints shape {frontend choices}. {Everything is connected}.
about.p3: {Founder} of {Solumentics}, partnered with {international SMEs} and institutions across Europe and Africa to build {software that actually matters}.
about.quote: I don't just write code. I own the outcome.

01.desc: The digital roadmap for accessibility in Germany. Led end-to-end architecture at Nextise GmbH to deliver WCAG-compliant tools and audits. Live at barrierehilfe.de.

02.desc: Specialized IT & AI training platform. Optimized legacy systems to support hands-on workshops for 3000+ participants and 250+ organizations.

03.desc: Custom-built thrift & resale marketplace with real-time inventory and Stripe integration. Scalable architecture for high-growth commerce.

04.desc: Strategic partner for AI integration and process automation. Building scalable, GDPR-compliant AI agents and workflows for German enterprises.

05.desc: Outreach automation platform — deployed on DO Kubernetes with self-healing DB clusters.

06.desc: Sister product to LinkReach. 40% deploy-time reduction via custom GitHub Actions.

07.desc: AI-powered workflow automation in the Nextise ecosystem.

08.desc: Sales intelligence workspace. Live at targetdesk.fr.

09.desc: Digital solutions via WAP'S CORPORATION (MTN Business Partner).

10.desc: Platform for an NGO client under Solumentics.

12.desc: Partnered w/ MTN Business ecosystem. Digital transformation delivery.

summary.label: § 01 — Summary
summary.text: Full-stack engineer with hands-on experience across the complete development lifecycle. Proficient in building {production} web applications, designing {scalable} backend systems, and managing the {cloud} they run on. Focused on delivering reliable, maintainable software that solves real problems for real businesses.

items.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Leading full-stack development of BarriereHilfe, a 3-tier accessibility platform for the German market, ensuring WCAG 2.2 compliance.
Orchestrating deployment of multiple SaaS products on DigitalOcean Kubernetes with self-healing clusters and automated scaling.
Reduced deployment time by 40% through custom GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code.
Modernizing legacy systems with Next.js SSR and edge caching, significantly improving core web vitals and SEO performance.

items.title: Founder & Lead Developer
bullets: Architected and deployed high-performance platforms including nadscam.org, csb-amasia.com, and ramanasa.com through strategic partnerships with MTN Business and Canal+ distributors.
Designed and launched thrift-plug.com, a full-scale e-commerce store built with Next.js and PayloadCMS, featuring custom AI integration for automated and accurate product descriptions.
Configured and managed Hostinger VPS environments with optimized Nginx configurations and custom GitHub CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments.
Led digital growth for client brands, including full setup and active management of Google My Business profiles to drive local engagement and visibility.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Developed high-throughput API services using Golang for a large-scale CRM system, optimizing data retrieval speeds.
Integrated Python-based LLM analysis tools into web dashboards to provide actionable real estate market insights.
Collaborated on optimized 2D interactive simulations using Unity for educational and training purposes.

items.org: University of Yaoundé I · Yaoundé, CM

items.degree: Higher National Diploma in Software Engineering
